'''APD-40s''' were [[Droid/Legends|droids]] with cylindrical heads that used gold wire and [[xylen chip]]s. Production of APD-40s ended during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], when they were replaced with [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droids]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}

[[Category:Protocol droid models]]
